front.name: Front Panel
front.notes: Cut 1 on fold. Grainline parallel to fold.

back.name: Back Panel
back.notes: Cut 1 on fold. Grainline parallel to fold.

sleeve.name: Sleeve
sleeve.notes: Cut 2 (mirror for left/right). Grainline runs vertically.

neck_band.name: Neck Band
neck_band.notes: Cut 1 on fold. Stretch to fit neckline. High tension seam.
